claims.required_action: Do not promote to verified test count without P0 TEST_OUTPUT.
Preserve limitation; future closure report should be regenerated from TARGETED_TEST_OUTPUT.
Use this whole-project handoff layer for global status; do not use A1 draft alone.
Include PRE_GPT_GATE_OUTPUT in future pack manifests.
Use active bounded/privacy-gated status from P1/P0 sources.
Do not claim production promotion without explicit current P0/P1 approval.
